title: Andrew Kelemen
compiled_truth: Andrew Kelemen is an Enron employee at [Enron](companies/enron). Over the corpus period (1999-07-09 to 2001-06-01), Andrew Kelemen sent 9 and received 97 emails, totalling 106 interactions.
